description_long: This humanoid robot features a smooth, streamlined body with a rounded head and a cylindrical torso, both finished in a light, matte white color. The head is characterized by a black faceplate with two glowing blue, almond-shaped eyes, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The arms are slender, elongated, and attached at the sides, appearing to be capable of simple up-and-down movement. There are no visible legs or lower appendages, and the robot's base is rounded, suggesting it may hover or glide rather than walk. A faint green circular marking is present on the upper left side of the torso, possibly indicating a status light or logo. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible joints, seams, or external sensors except for the eyes.
description: A sleek, white humanoid robot with a rounded head, glowing blue eyes, and slender arms, featuring a minimalist and friendly design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black faceplate with blue eyes, both arms visible, and a faint green marking on the left torso.
description_view_1: Left three-quarter view highlighting the side profile of the head, one arm, and the green marking on the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, featureless back of the head and torso, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view showing the side of the head, one arm, and no visible markings on the torso.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright standing pose with its head facing forward and both arms hanging straight down at its sides.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated smooth panels with no decorative elements or coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a black, oval faceplate with two glowing blue, almond-shaped eyes and no visible mouth, nose, or other facial features.
attribute_limb_articulation: The arms are attached at the shoulders with no visible joints or articulation points, suggesting limited or simple hinge movement; no hands, legs, or feet are present.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible visual sensors in the form of the blue eyes on the faceplate; none other visible.
